title: Robert Samuel Langer Jr. FREng is an American biotechnologist, businessman, chemical engineer, chemist, and inventor. He is one of the nine Institute Professors at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology.
excerpts:
**Robert Samuel Langer Jr.** FREng <sup>[[ 1 ]]()</sup> (born August 29, 1948) is an American biotechnologist, businessman, chemical engineer , chemist, and inventor. He is one of the nine Institute Professors at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology . <sup>[[ 3 ]]()</sup>
He was formerly the Germeshausen Professor of Chemical and Biomedical Engineering and maintains activity in the Department of Chemical Engineering and the Department of Biological Engineering at MIT. He is also a faculty member of the Harvard–MIT Program in Health Sciences and Technology and the Koch Institute for Integrative Cancer Research .

title: Robert Langer | MIT Department of Biological Engineering
excerpts:
Section Title: Robert Langer, ScD > Research:
Content:
The Langer Laboratory works at the interface of biotechnology and materials science to address a wide range of problems in human health, including the detection, monitoring, and treatment of cancer. A major focus is the study and development of materials such as polymers and lipids to deliver drugs, particularly genetically engineered proteins and DNA and RNA, continuously at controlled rates for prolonged periods of time. In addition, we are developing drugs that specifically inhibit the process of neovascularization that is critical to several disease processes, including cancer, without interfering with existing blood vessels.
[Publications](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/?term=Robert+Langer%5BAuthor%5D+OR+Robert+S.+Langer%5BAuthor%5D+OR+R+Langer%5BAuthor%5D&sort=pubdate)

title: Robert S. Langer, Sc.D. | Academy of Achievement
excerpts:
Section Title: Robert S. Langer, Sc.D. > The Edison of Medicine
Content:
Langer displays one of the implant devices he has invented to deliver medication. He is a “pioneer of many new technologies, including controlled release systems and transdermal delivery systems which allow the dispensing of drugs or extraction of analytes from the body through the skin without needles or other invasive methods.”

title: Dr Robert Langer: The Most Cited Engineer in History
excerpts:
Dr Robert Langer: The Most Cited Engineer in History
Dr Robert Langer – a chemical engineer, scientist, entrepreneur, inventor and the most cited engineer in history - specializing in the biotechnology fields.
